name: LCM GCD Calculator
desc: Lcm Gcd Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
description: Calculate least common multiple and greatest common divisor.
seo_title: Lcm Gcd Calculator – Free Online Tool
seo_description: Use our free lcm gcd calculator to quickly estimate mcm, mcd based on num1, num2. No registration needed.
example_label: Calculate LCM and GCD of 12 and 18.

range_hints.num1: Positive integers only; typical: 1-10,000 for practical use
range_hints.num2: Positive integers only; same range as num1

result_context: The mcm ({mcm}) is the smallest number divisible by both inputs; mcd ({mcd}) is the largest number that divides both inputs evenly.
formula_display: GCD: Euclidean algorithm | LCM = (num1 × num2) ÷ GCD
mistakes: Using decimal numbers instead of integers for GCD/LCM
Confusing which is larger (LCM ≥ both numbers, GCD ≤ both numbers)
Forgetting that GCD is needed to calculate LCM efficiently
